title: Jola selected to represent SA at Cossasa games in Swaziland
description: JANSENVILLE NEWS - A Grade 10 learner from...
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"JANSENVILLE NEWS - A Grade 10 learner from Gcinubuzwe Combined School, Endinako Jola (18), has been selected to represent South Africa in the 3 000m at the Cossasa (Confederation of School Sport Associations of Southern Africa) Games in Swaziland from 23 to 29 August.","html":"JANSENVILLE NEWS - A Grade 10 learner from Gcinubuzwe Combined School, Endinako Jola (18), has been selected to represent South Africa in the 3 000m at the Cossasa (Confederation of School Sport Associations of Southern Africa) Games in Swaziland from 23 to 29 August."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Jola, as the only athlete from the Eastern Cape to be selected for this event, is the pride of the Eastern Cape Schools Athletics."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Jola was a gold medallist and record breaker at the National Schools Athletics Championship held in Bloemfontein in April.","html":"Jola was a gold medallist and record breaker at the National Schools Athletics Championship held in Bloemfontein in April."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"His father and coach, Luthando Sikiwe, is very happy with Jola's progress and proudly says that he also does cross-country marathons, field items, and track items (1 500m and 800m).","html":"His father and coach, Luthando Sikiwe, is very happy with Jola's progress and proudly says that he also does cross-country marathons, field items, and track items (1 500m and 800m)."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The school's principal, Vuyolwethu Mbune, is excited about the great news and appeals to the public and community to support Jola in this endeavour .This is a self-funded championship and Jola still needs some financial support to be able to attend.","html":"The school's principal, Vuyolwethu Mbune, is excited about the great news and appeals to the public and community to support Jola in this endeavour .

This is a self-funded championship and Jola still needs some financial support to be able to attend."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The costs are R2 500 for sports wear, R2 000 for transport, R1 800 for catering, and R3 700 for accommodation.","html":"The costs are R2 500 for sports wear, R2 000 for transport, R1 800 for catering, and R3 700 for accommodation."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Eastern Cape Schools Athletics promised to assist with R2 000.","html":"Eastern Cape Schools Athletics promised to assist with R2 000."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Jola's parents and his school ask for donations and/or funding from the community.","html":"Jola's parents and his school ask for donations and/or funding from the community."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“I believe and know that God is with us daily and we will achieve this goal.","html":"“I believe and know that God is with us daily and we will achieve this goal."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This is a lifetime opportunity for him to represent our country,” Sikiwe says. “This is a lifetime opportunity.”","html":"This is a lifetime opportunity for him to represent our country,” Sikiwe says. “This is a lifetime opportunity.”"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sikiwe can be contacted on 067 858 7710 or 065 170 5974 (WhatsApp).","html":"Sikiwe can be contacted on 067 858 7710 or 065 170 5974 (WhatsApp)."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Any donations towards athletic gear or cash that will enable Jola to go to Swaziland will be greatly appreciated.","html":"Any donations towards athletic gear or cash that will enable Jola to go to Swaziland will be greatly appreciated."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Jola selected to represent SA at Cossasa games in Swaziland
